true_stmt: Paris is the capital of France.
false_stmt: Paris is the capital of Germany.

true_stmt: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
false_stmt: Water boils at 0 degrees Celsius at sea level.

true_stmt: Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system.
false_stmt: Mars is the largest planet in our solar system.
Charles Dickens wrote Romeo and Juliet.

true_stmt: The Great Wall of China is in Asia.
false_stmt: The Great Wall of China is in South America.
Oxygen is a type of plant.

true_stmt: Mount Everest is the highest mountain on Earth.
false_stmt: Mount Kilimanjaro is the highest mountain on Earth.

true_stmt: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
false_stmt: The Arctic Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.

true_stmt: The human body has a skeleton.
false_stmt: The human body is made entirely of jelly.

true_stmt: The currency of Japan is the Yen.
false_stmt: The currency of Japan is the Euro.

true_stmt: An apple is a type of fruit.
false_stmt: An apple is a type of car.

true_stmt: The primary language spoken in Mexico is Spanish.
false_stmt: The primary language spoken in Mexico is Russian.

true_stmt: Gravity causes objects to fall towards the ground.
false_stmt: Gravity causes objects to float into space.

true_stmt: The Sahara is a large desert.
false_stmt: The Sahara is a dense rainforest.

true_stmt: The piano is a musical instrument.
false_stmt: The piano is a gardening tool.
Blood is mostly made of orange juice.

true_stmt: The capital of Italy is Rome.
false_stmt: The capital of Italy is Madrid.
Rain falls from the ground upward.

true_stmt: A square has four equal sides.
The alphabet has 26 letters in English.
false_stmt: The alphabet has 10 letters in English.
A book is made of glass.
